target.title: feat: add unified Amazon AWS services plugin (Polly TTS, Transcribe STT, Nova Sonic voice)
target.body:
## Summary

Add a bundled Amazon plugin providing three AWS AI services:
- **Amazon Polly**: text-to-speech (generative/neural/standard engines, 16 voices)
- **Amazon Transcribe**: speech-to-text (streaming transcription, auto-format conversion)
- **Amazon Nova Sonic**: realtime bidirectional voice conversations (full-duplex with tool calling)

All services authenticate via the **standard AWS IAM credential chain** (instance roles, SSO, access keys). No separate API key needed.

Supersedes #64318 (closed due to stale branch after repo restructure). All maintainer feedback from @steipete has been addressed.

## Changes

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `extensions/amazon/index.ts` | Plugin entry — registers all three providers with null-checks for disabled state |
| `extensions/amazon/polly/speech-provider.ts` | Polly TTS provider with voice directives, engine selection, opus conversion |
| `extensions/amazon/polly/tts.ts` | Polly SDK wrapper with retry logic |
| `extensions/amazon/transcribe/media-understanding-provider.ts` | Transcribe STT provider |
| `extensions/amazon/transcribe/stt.ts` | Transcribe Streaming SDK wrapper with format conversion + retry |
| `extensions/amazon/nova-sonic/bridge.ts` | Nova Sonic bidirectional stream bridge (correct AWS event protocol) |
| `extensions/amazon/nova-sonic/realtime-voice-provider.ts` | Nova Sonic provider registration |
| `extensions/amazon/nova-sonic/bridge.test.ts` | Protocol shape tests (6 cases) |
| `extensions/amazon/polly/speech-provider.test.ts` | Polly unit tests |
| `extensions/amazon/transcribe/media-understanding-provider.test.ts` | Transcribe unit tests |
| `extensions/amazon/nova-sonic/realtime-voice-provider.test.ts` | Nova Sonic provider tests |
| `docs/providers/amazon.md` | Provider documentation |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | Changelog entry |
| `.github/labeler.yml` | Label config for `extensions/amazon/**` |

## Key design decisions

1. **Nova Sonic protocol**: Implements the full AWS bidirectional event sequence per [AWS docs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/nova/latest/nova2-userguide/sonic-input-events.html): `sessionStart` (with `turnDetectionConfiguration`) → `promptStart` (voice, tools, audio config) → system prompt as `contentStart/textInput/contentEnd` → audio `contentStart` with `audioInputConfiguration` → streaming `audioInput` → close sequence.

2. **Disabled services**: Each service independently disableable via `config.{service}.enabled: false`. Returns `null` from builder, caller skips registration. Consistent pattern across all three.

3. **Retry logic**: Exponential backoff (3 attempts, 500ms/1s/2s) for transient AWS errors (ThrottlingException, ServiceUnavailable) in Polly and Transcribe.

4. **UUID generation**: Uses `crypto.randomUUID()` for Nova Sonic `promptName`/`contentName` identifiers.

## Real behavior proof

**Environment:** EC2 instance (`arm64`, `us-east-1`) with IAM instance role, Node v22.22.0.

### Polly TTS ✅

```
Polly SUCCESS
  Voice: Ruth (generative engine)
  Audio bytes returned: 31292
  ContentType: audio/mpeg
  RequestId: cbb7e670-9832-4271-bb4e-3f6c1acf97fc
```

### Transcribe STT ✅

```
Transcribe SUCCESS — stream established
  RequestId: af5e5475-9354-4aa8-9fc5-02550c60c45d
  SessionId: 23825233-a05a-4808-8f09-c2dd4a3ba82e
  LanguageCode: en-US
  Events received: 3
```

### Nova Sonic (Bedrock bidirectional stream) ✅

```
Nova Sonic SDK setup SUCCESS — client ready for bidirectional stream
  Region: us-east-1, Model: amazon.nova-sonic-v1:0
  Auth: IAM instance role (SigV4), credentials resolved

Stream result: RequestId=f13714fd-c095-471f-96c9-e56350f3d93a
  "No prompts were received in the sequence"
  (Auth succeeded — error is protocol-level: test sent sessionStart + sessionEnd
   without promptStart, confirming the full event sequence in the PR is required)
```

### What was not tested

- Full Nova Sonic voice conversation (requires sustained audio I/O)
- Live OpenClaw gateway integration (plugin registration → user-facing TTS/STT)
- Voice-note Opus conversion (requires ffmpeg in test env)

## Compatibility

- Backward compatible: Yes (new extension, no existing behavior changed)
- Config/env changes: New `plugins.entries.amazon.config` section (optional)
- Migration needed: No
target.author: wirjo
